---
title: "Sample diagnostic report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  diagnostics_dir: "output/diagnostics_pca_outliers"
  sample: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

diagnostics_dir <- params$diagnostics_dir
sample_filter <- params$sample

read_optional_csv <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

safe_file_part <- function(x) {
  gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+", "_", as.character(x))
}

summary_path <- file.path(diagnostics_dir, "diagnose_samples_summary.csv")
summary_tbl <- read_optional_csv(summary_path)

if (!is.null(summary_tbl) && nzchar(sample_filter) && "sample" %in% names(summary_tbl)) {
  summary_tbl <- summary_tbl[toupper(summary_tbl$sample) == toupper(sample_filter), , drop = FALSE]
}

pca_tbl <- read_optional_csv(file.path(diagnostics_dir, "pca_outlier_candidates.csv"))
totals_tbl <- read_optional_csv(file.path(diagnostics_dir, "sample_totals_missing_frac.csv"))
```

```{r validate}
if (!dir.exists(diagnostics_dir)) {
  stop("Diagnostics directory not found: ", diagnostics_dir)
}
```

## Diagnostics Directory

`r diagnostics_dir`

```{r summary}
if (is.null(summary_tbl) || nrow(summary_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No diagnose_samples_summary.csv rows available for this report.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(summary_tbl)
}
```

## PCA Outlier Scores

```{r pca}
if (is.null(pca_tbl) || nrow(pca_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No pca_outlier_candidates.csv file was found.")
} else {
  display_cols <- intersect(
    c("sample", "PC1", "PC2", "pca_robust_distance", "is_pca_outlier"),
    names(pca_tbl)
  )
  knitr::kable(head(pca_tbl[, display_cols, drop = FALSE], 25))
}
```

## Sample Totals

```{r totals}
if (is.null(totals_tbl) || nrow(totals_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No sample_totals_missing_frac.csv file was found.")
} else {
  totals_tbl <- totals_tbl[order(totals_tbl$missing_frac, decreasing = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
  knitr::kable(head(totals_tbl, 25))
}
```

## Top Features

```{r top-features}
samples_to_show <- character(0)
if (!is.null(summary_tbl) && "sample" %in% names(summary_tbl)) {
  samples_to_show <- summary_tbl$sample
}
if (length(samples_to_show) == 0 && nzchar(sample_filter)) {
  samples_to_show <- sample_filter
}

if (length(samples_to_show) == 0) {
  cat("No selected sample was available for top-feature tables.")
} else {
  for (sample_name in samples_to_show) {
    top_path <- file.path(diagnostics_dir, paste0("top_features_", safe_file_part(sample_name), ".csv"))
    top_tbl <- read_optional_csv(top_path)
    cat("\n\n### ", sample_name, "\n\n", sep = "")
    if (is.null(top_tbl) || nrow(top_tbl) == 0) {
      cat("No top-feature table found for this sample.")
    } else {
      knitr::kable(head(top_tbl, 25))
    }
  }
}
```
